about_ai_intro: Avian Influenza (AI) is a contagious viral disease that occurs in birds. Highly Pathogenic Avian Influenza (HPAI) is characterized by high mortality and rapid transmission.
about_ai_feature_1: Pathogenicity: Classified as High (HPAI) or Low (LPAI)
about_ai_feature_2: Transmission route: Wild birds → Poultry → Humans (some variants)
about_ai_feature_3: Representative variants: H5N1, H7N9, H5N6, etc.
about_ai_zoonosis_text: Some AI viruses can infect humans, and the WHO classifies them as a public health threat, recommending continuous monitoring.
about_ai_global_status_text: Large-scale outbreaks have been repeatedly reported in Europe, Asia, North America, and Africa. In 2024, the first infection case was also confirmed in Antarctica.
about_service_intro: BirdFluAI is a visualization and analysis platform based on Highly Pathogenic Avian Influenza (HPAI) outbreak data.
about_service_feature_1: Real-time outbreak visualization on a map
about_service_data_sources_text: Data is processed from public institutions such as WAHIS, Korea Disease Control and Prevention Agency, Animal and Plant Quarantine Agency, and foreign quarantine authorities.
